basic_details.job_title: NHSRC Junior Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Health Systems Resource Centre (NHSRC) Junior Consultant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website NHSRC . A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the NHSRC Junior Consultant Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 55 years of age who have Bachelor’s Degree in Science with Master’s Degree/Diploma in Public Health OR Bachelor’s Degree in Commerce with Master’s Degree/Diploma in Business Administration/Commerce/Health Financing along with relevant experience are eligible to apply for these Junior Consultant vacancies. The online application process for NHSRC Juni

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree in Science with Master's Degree / Diploma in Public Health, Bachelor's Degree in Commerce with Master's Degree / Diploma in Business Administration / Commerce
qualification.details: Bachelor's Degree in Science with Master's Degree/Diploma in Public Health OR Bachelor's Degree in Commerce with Master's Degree/Diploma in Business Administration/Commerce/Health Financing. At least 5 years post-qualification experience in health sector financing data, budgets & accounts. Proficiency in MS Office, SAS, data analysis. Experience in public health, monitoring & evaluation.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NHSRC Junior Consultant Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 01-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NHSRC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NHSRC Junior Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The last date for receiving applications for the NHSRC Junior Consultant (NHA Cell, BoP) posts is 01 June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted online before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Consultant position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Junior Consultant (NHA Cell, BoP) post released by the National Health Systems Resource Centre (NHSRC).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Bachelor's Degree in Science with a Master's Degree/Diploma in Public Health OR a Bachelor's Degree in Commerce with a Master's Degree/Diploma in Business Administration/Commerce/Health Financing.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Junior Consultant role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Consultant (NHA Cell, BoP) position is 55 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for this position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 40,000/- to Rs. 70,000/- Per Month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for NHSRC Junior Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the NHSRC Junior Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Written Test. Candidates need to secure 50% qualifying marks. If there are many applicants, a shortlist will be made in a 1:5 ratio.

faq.question: Q8. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The job is on a Contract basis for the Junior Consultant (NHA Cell, BoP) position at NHSRC.

faq.question: Q9. What is the minimum post-qualification experience required?
faq.answer: A minimum of 5 years of post-qualification experience in health sector financing data, budgets & accounts is required.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the application link in the "Important Links" section of this article. The official website is also provided for further information.
